name: LicenseHub Pro: PHP + Preact license platform
description: Full-stack license management with Vite/Preact, PHP 8, MySQL, Stripe, Argon2id, optional 2FA, and GDPR-oriented account flows.
longDescription: LicenseHub Pro pairs a Preact + TypeScript frontend (Tailwind, i18n EN/pt-PT, accessibility-minded UI) with a PHP REST backend backed by MySQL. It covers secure authentication, payment-gated service creation with Stripe (cards, MB WAY, Multibanco where configured), license lifecycle (issue, rotate, suspend, revoke), device binding with grace periods, HMAC-based keys, audit trails, and OpenAPI 3.1 documentation. Docker-oriented development and deployment paths are documented alongside config-driven behaviour.
features: Argon2id password hashing with optional TOTP 2FA and backup codes
CSRF protection, secure sessions, rate limiting, and brute-force mitigations
Stripe checkout flows with refund and license state coordination
REST API with role separation and audit logging
Device binding and machine verification patterns for software licensing
highlights: Security-first defaults across auth, payments, and license APIs
Documented GDPR export/delete flows in product materials
challenges: Licensing platforms sit at the intersection of payments, cryptographic key hygiene, and abuse resistance; mistakes echo into customer trust.
solutions: Layer explicit CSRF and session controls, structured audit logs, Stripe webhooks with idempotent handling, and environment-only secrets with rotation guidance.
security: CSRF tokens on mutating requests; secure cookie flags in production
Rate limiting and brute-force protections on sensitive endpoints
Stripe and webhook secrets confined to environment configuration
HMAC and peppered digests for license material—no plaintext key material in logs
